name: arunner
description: Orchestrate AI coding agents (or any job that appends JSON lines to a file) across many repos from one agent session. The harness skill drives a disk-backed state machine via in-session ScheduleWakeup polling: each tick dispatches worker subagents (Task tool) or detached shell workers, tails their heartbeats, advances the state machine, prints a status table, and reschedules - until every job reaches a terminal state or you write a STOP file. No external scheduler, no long-running daemon.
